label: Aquatech repayment of shareholder loan to Bertrand Byrne
book_treatment: Reduce shareholder loan payable / related liability
return_treatment: Not a Page 1 deduction; principal repayment of shareholder debt. Review Schedule L and Form 7203 debt-basis impact.
note: User-directed 2025 adjustment entered in Codex on 2026-03-12. Confirm note, amortization, and remaining balance against the underlying loan documents.

section: Due to shareholder / reimbursable business expenses
label: Business expenses paid on Bertrand Byrne personal credit card
book_treatment: Record deductible business expenses with offset to due-to-shareholder liability or shareholder loan, if not already booked
return_treatment: Potential corporate deduction if substantiated and not already in the books; generally treat at the corporation level rather than as a personal unreimbursed employee expense.
note: User-directed 2025 adjustment entered in Codex on 2026-03-12. Retain receipts and reimbursement/accountable-plan support before filing.
